textByHash.0040805a4b34fc162553f9005fd2339f6a2228a1: Ok, it's one Wizard Blizzard I need. Let me know when it's done.
textByHash.05eddc7595ce4081b0359464bee1378aa3e29c33: I'm sure you'll make a great barman.
textByHash.0b79f3552ca85d6fd176ebf1a6c3d7de2567df0b: Here, take this cocktail guide. The book tells you how to make all the cocktails we serve. I'll tell you what I need and you can make them.
textByHash.0be6491a7e94ab5cd7fe69ec34ab2f2fb622af10: I don't know what you have there but it's no Fruit Blast!
textByHash.1db835f50c9c58ba55e54d4aac948e576622ae10: However, you'll need some basic gnome cooking training if you want to work for Lufty. Go and have a chat with his Dad, Aluft Gianne Snr. Hel'll tell you what you need to do.
textByHash.2b98f271f1188a4880e70338bd50870b486a2138: Hmmm... not bad, not bad at all.
textByHash.2d6c59a84edefef5c1b4505ec5dc4ffecfb099bf: Now can you make me a Pineapple Punch? I can give you what you need, but again I won't be able to give you any more if you make a mistake.
textByHash.3d90d07e3d9212126b011fec87a312168019ff8b: Ah, you've come to the best stop on your list! I'll give you my famous Fire Toad Blast! It'll cost you 10 coins.
textByHash.468f1e57f928d86569556c71c1191b2081d8988e: No, I need you to make the Fruit Blast yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.
textByHash.4795fafbe4a4ebbcb41f3ce806f8e2302fa98cd7: No, I need you to make the Wizard Blizzard yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.
textByHash.4f35c4abb0bdfdf36a6f1ce9bc1590d58b49708b: have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...
textByHash.611dae780cb0455c208c5c0df7241b524d066940: Not bad, not bad at all.... I can certainly sell drinks of that quality.
textByHash.671b14026f9eb69756561174d91e78ead3573c4d: How are you faring with the Pineapple Punch?
textByHash.6e24098bb79d54813d4e78b090badf7aa1c803bf: Take a look at the book then come and talk to me.
textByHash.7eb19bc9c53a2b8ae350d14bb8d12b2a3004618a: Well your training is over . Are you interested in some work?
textByHash.7f2a239bc54b57bd6d89f419fa30ebbbdfa33545: Go and have a chat with my young Lufty Jnr. and he'll fill you in with details.
textByHash.8784fdfb716e5ea723ac4a0748e52ad44ea058fc: So, have you got my Short Green Guy?
textByHash.87d430cad7580f8659d400f1dca4861a8b8efa7b: No, I need you to make the Pineapple Punch yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.
textByHash.89a29682feba1fd8386c20d57270baac07f58024: good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfill some of the other orders...
textByHash.8ee177f9d6fa1e872b8f7df36a3df2cfb2d0ebca: A Short Green Guy, and don't bring me a gnome. Here's all you need.
textByHash.93c775899d3df19f8dbbdeec60520785fb832a08: Hello, how did it go with the Wizard Blizzard.
textByHash.9f699edf196a5448287cc689348da96eb29365a7: Or if you're looking for some training in cocktail making, then I'm your gnome! Aluft Gianne jnr. is looking for gnome cooks, barmen and barwomen to help in his new venture, so it's a useful skill to have. I'm
textByHash.b6427e8792dfe93dbe07c465229109b087672b18: Ok, well let me know when you're done.
textByHash.c0a941c5a47f0ede1cf16b01314f4e2aede3951f: Ooh, that's a frisky little number. Very tart, how it should be. Excellent. Well I'm happy to recommend you to the Giannes. You truly are a gnomish bartender now..
textByHash.c5b77955cbe552ee7ffc9299177b07b0c439e37b: Well that is both Wizardy and Blizzardy. You're quite a bartender.
textByHash.c8b64576a923af4d2f0774b50cc8a0ec792f258f: Ok then, to start with make a Fruit Blast. Here, you'll need these ingredients, but I'm afraid I can't give you any more if you mess up.
textByHash.c934d678e891ccc4f25d3490fb38c1703ab4b497: sure the human girls will like it as well.
textByHash.c9eb1f450ac9ecdb2154d0671951e1625c3263e9: Okay, let's test you once more. Make me a SGG, then we'll see if you have what it takes.
textByHash.cb9288cc3b4da8df12ffb5ce303a3d0239ea5eeb: No, I need you to make the SGG yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.
textByHash.d032adc50fa33d7293f8dc3baed2c6e3e1f7e15d: Well hello there traveller. If you're looking for a cocktail the barman will happily make you one.
textByHash.de03d8e32af60d1501aea278f2fdb45fdf3676e3: Excellent. It's not an easy job, I'll have to try you out first. I'm sure you'll be great though.
textByHash.e1f11465e81aded53cff295c1251781f4b343ba9: I can see how that would make it hard to mix cocktails. I'll give you another one, but please try not lose any more.
textByHash.eda77ec3793b91c292038a2ed09377bb9cced09f: Hi, are you ready to make your first cocktail?
textByHash.efb96e43a9545ca34a8942ea6a00b80c2272b3ee: Aluft Gianne Snr. tells me that you have finished training with him, so I think you're ready to do some work for Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of the new Gnome Food Delivery service. I've heard there are
textByHash.f188c50693c61aa77b2f142e88ba397f11fc1453: Let me know when it's done.
textByHash.f5528cb5bf70ad63b50cc6996904f795c10e27d1: sure the human boys will like it as well.
textByHash.fb5fabb1e00bd5355d08016d5df4a34f5b832826: Okay then let's try something with some real booze in it! Make me a Wizard Blizzard.
textByHash.fd19d63f30e130912a278ee1a072ed14d034c1de: I think you're almost ready to do some work for Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of a new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There are good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may
